title: Fix Perl scanner P2 bugs: heredocContinue EOF infinite loop + missing MarkEnd() calls
description:
Two medium-severity bugs in scanners/perl/scanner.go:

1. Infinite loop in heredocContinue at EOF: TokenHeredocMiddle handler loop has no EOF check. If input ends mid-heredoc-continue without trailing newline, loop never exits (Lookahead=-1 doesn't match newline or interpolation escape).

Fix: Add lexer.EOF() check at top of loop, emit TokenHeredocMiddle if sawChars, else return false.

2. Missing MarkEnd() before return true in 5 paths: TokenGobbledContent, TokenNonassoc, TokenCtrlZ, PerlySemicolon, TokenPod. Scanner sets ResultSymbol directly, so AcceptToken's markEndCalled fallback doesn't apply.

Fix: Add lexer.MarkEnd() before each return true in these paths.

Also P3: tspString.eq() only compares first 8 chars (increase maxTSPStringLen), skipChars infinite loop on negative maxLen.
